data.title: Why Is SOBR Safe Stock Rocketing On Premarket Friday?
data.description: SOBR stock surges as company cancels public offering. Stock jumped premarket.

data.title: Why US-Listed China ETFs Are Gaining Up To 6% In Friday's Premarket
data.description: China's stronger-than-expected GDP figures for the third quarter have led to a notable surge in U.S.-listed China-based ETFs during pre-market trading.

data.title: Saudi Arabia Targeting Billions In Zambian Assets, Despite Persistent Infrastructure Troubles
data.description: Manara Minerals, a joint venture of PIF and Ma'aden, is set to acquire 15-20% of First Quantum's Zambian mines, worth $1.5-2B. It aligns with Manara's $1B investment in Barrick Gold's project and $2.5B in Vale. Zambia faces infrastructure and power supply challenges in boosting its copper output.

data.title: Why Intuitive Surgical Shares Are Trading Higher By Around 7%; Here Are 20 Stocks Moving Premarket
Billionaire Investor Ray Dalio Urges Xi Jinping's China To Implement This To Prevent Debt Crisis: 'They Have The Willingness To Do That'
data.description: This comes in the wake of China's recent stimulus measures, which Dalio believes should be complemented with this strategy to avert a potential debt crisis.
